description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Check drive database branches 7.0-7.5 that runs on a workflow dispatch. The workflow should have multiple ubuntu-latest jobs, each checking a specific branch of the smartmontools repository, including 7.0, 7.1, 7.2, 7.3, 7.4, 7.5, and 8.0. For each job, checkout the code, build and configure smartmontools, run update-smart-drivedb, and perform checks.
